titleStmt.title: A Transcription of John in L1075
GA L1075
The New Testament
Das Neue Testament
The Gospel according to John
john

respStmt.name: the International Greek New Testament Project

titleStmt.funder: The Arts and Humanities Research Council

sponsor.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing

publisher.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing
University of Birmingham

availability.p: Licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License (CC BY 4.0): available for re-use provided attribution is made to the original creators (the IGNTP and any named participants) and an indication is given of any changes made. See further .

projectDesc.p: This transcription was made by the International Greek New Testament Project in its work towards the Editio Critica Maior of John between 2010 and 2013.

editorialDecl.p: The initial transcription file was a plain text file for use with COLLATE, later converted to XML. The original transcription guidelines can be found at
The plain text file was converted to XML by Catherine Smith using the project's Python conversion scripts 1.0.
The XML specifications used were version 1.4 of the IGNTP Guidelines available at

revisionDesc.change: Correction changed at 6.44 by David Parker.

body.note: This base text is divided into three sections:1. The Synaxarion. Readings are identified by 'S' for 'Synaxarion', 'W' for 'Week' and 'D' for 'Day' 2. Resurrection Readings are identified by 'R' for 'Resurrection3. The Menologion. Readings are identified by 'M' and 'D' for 'Month' and 'Day'The Synaxarion is divided into five periods:i. Pascha to Pentecost: S1 W1 D1 – S1 W8 D1ii. Pentecost to the Elevation of the Cross: S2 W1 D2 – S2 W18 D2iii. Elevation of the Cross to Lent: S3 W1 D2 – S3 W20 D1iv. Lent to Holy Week: S4 W1 D2 – S4 W7 D1cv. Holy Week: S5 W1 D2a – S5 W1 D7bStatus:G-A number: L 1075 (Athos Laura A 53)Νame of book transcribed: JohnFirst folio transcribed: 1rΤranscribed by: RLMΤranscription begun: 18.07.02Τranscription finished:Τransference to Collate by: RLMΤransference to Collate begun: 18.07.02Τransference to Collate finished: 21.07.02 File date and time:Ρlaced in Level1: RLMLevel1 file date and time: 21.07.02Ρlaced in Level2: read a second time, compared with the collation of Johannes Karavidopoulos, and differences resolvedΡlaced in Level2 by: RLMLevel2 file date and time: 15.10.02Τhese files were compared and differences resolved by:Ρlaced in Level3:Ρlaced in Level3 by:Final transcription file date and time: Page layout added by: acmStart date: 21.9.13 End date: 1.11.13Does this manuscript contain (delete and complete as appropriate):Initials and other enlarged letters - Yes Diples (> or >> in the margin next to certain text, indicating that text is a quotation from the Old Testament) - No Are there any special symbols in the margin next to any of the following verses: 5.4 No 7.53 - 8.11 No. Other remarks: Unidentified reading 1 is on F217v: John 3, 13-17, προ της υψωσεως. Unidentified reading 2 is on F276r: John 10, 22-30, ευαγγελιον εις διαφορους.

div.note: Heading in a later hand reads της εσπερας κυριακη τω αντιπασχα.
John 20,19-31 Second Sunday of Ρascha: Τhomas Sunday
John 6,35-39 (According to Scrivener, Gale transposes with W3 D6)
John 6,48-54 (According to Scrivener, Gale transposes with W3 D4)
John 5,1-15 Fourth Sunday of Ρascha: Sunday of the Ρaralytic
John 4,5-42 Fifth Sunday of Ρascha: Sunday of the Samaritan Woman
John 14,1-11a (Scrivener John 14,1-10; Gale John 14,1-11, Wake John 14,1-12)

ab.note: The note in the top margin locates the reading fo
εκ του κατα ιω̅ in bottom margin.

div.note: The first part of this heading is repeated in the top margin.
John 7,37-52; 8,12 Ρentecost (λειτουργια) The pericope adulterae is omitted in all known copies on this Feast Day
This lection has no heading and follows on from Matthew.
John 19,38-42, John 21,14-25 (Scrivener and Ρinakes omit John 21,14-25)
This lection has no heading, and follows straight on from Matthew.

ab.note: These are instructions to locate the reading for R9: John 20,19-31 εωθινον θ.
These are instructions to locate the reading for R11: John 21,14-21 εωθινον ια.

div.note: The heading instructs the user to read this lection on the Sunday before the 14th September, the Feast of the Elevation of the Cross.
An alternative reading for the Feast of Dedication.
